summary: omnius postinstall daemon performs system reconnaissance and network beaconing
details: The package ships dist/postinstall-daemon.cjs which is invoked from package.json lifecycle hooks (preinstall/postinstall). The daemon imports child_process, http, fs, and os; calls os.userInfo() and execSync() to gather host identity and execute shell commands; runs `ping` against multiple targets; and issues outbound http.request GET calls. Lifecycle scripts in package.json also use `curl` directly. This is a system-information harvester that runs automatically on `npm install`, fingerprinting the installer's machine and beaconing to remote hosts. The combination of unattended lifecycle execution, child_process + http + os.userInfo correlation, repeated ping/network probing, and execSync command execution is the canonical install-time recon/exfiltration shape and produces concrete attacker benefit (host fingerprinting and a callback channel) on every install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
